summaryForNext: 4 OpenSpec changes (19 tasks) in dependency order: add-oauth-endpoint-hardening (G1,5) -> add-bcrypt-secrets (G2,5) -> add-identity-classification-edges (G3,5) -> add-actor-token-and-hydra-delegate (G4,4). ZeeSpec inactive. Operator decisions baked in: G1 hard client-auth on /oauth/introspect + rate-limit on /oauth/token (both get governor; Hydra-delegate behind introspect auth); G2 format-sniff verify with transparent re-hash to bcrypt (no lockout); G4 reject actor_token if present (fail-closed, defer chaining) + wire Hydra-delegate proxy. One new crate: bcrypt@0.19. Backend openspec, driver kbd-apply. Every change has a fail-closed degrades_to_deny test task.
